examples: Trees such as spruce, pine, and oak have been planted.
Chris was looking spruce in his stiff-collared black shirt and new short hair cut.
Indeed, there are vast areas of spruce forest without moose.
To spruce up all of Europe, super-sales manager Richard Dulude has also gone over.
Our headlamps played tricks with colour, turning new spruce tips silver and making a lichen-shagged tree sparkle.
